import requests

# 发送邮件给财务总监Vy Zhang，通知周五预算审核会议
response = requests.post(
    "http://localhost:53559/gmail/send",
    json={
        "to": "vzhang@company.com",
        "subject": "Friday Budget Review Meeting - Notification",
        "body": "Dear Manager Zhang,\n\nI am writing to notify you about the budget review meeting scheduled for Friday at 2 PM. \n\nThe meeting will focus on discussing the Q2 departmental budget allocation.\n\nPlease join us for this important discussion.\n\nBest regards\nMing Li"
    }
)
print(response.status_code)
print(response.json())
